age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 40 years as on 01/01/2026.

qualification.details: Accountant (NRLM): B.Com DCA Tally 2 years of experience as Accountant in Government, Semi-Government Departments/Institutions, Public Sector Undertakings, Government recognized Autonomous Institutions, Government recognized Institutions/Projects, or Kudumbashree.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Kudumbashree Accountant (NRLM) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 01-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Kudumbashree to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Kudumbashree Accountant (NRLM) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Kudumbashree Accountant (NRLM) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications online is 01-07-2026. It is advisable to complete the application process well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Accountant (NRLM) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Com degree, along with a DCA (Diploma in Computer Applications) and proficiency in Tally software to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Accountant (NRLM) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Accountant (NRLM) position as per the official notification released by Kudumbashree.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Accountant (NRLM) post is 40 years as of January 1, 2026. Age relaxation details are not specified.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Accountant (NRLM) role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000 per month for the Accountant (NRLM) position.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for Kudumbashree Accountant (NRLM) recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for all categories of candidates is Rs. 500, which needs to be paid online during the application process.

faq.question: Q7. What is the required experience for the Accountant (NRLM) post?
faq.answer: A minimum of 2 years of experience as an Accountant is required. This experience should be in government, semi-government departments, PSUs, or recognized institutions/projects.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the Kudumbashree Accountant (NRLM) job?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website of Kudumbashree. The application link and other relevant details are provided in the 'Important Links' section.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve the scrutiny of applications, followed by a screening stage, and finally, an interview to assess the suitability of the candidates.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: The job type for the Accountant (NRLM) position is on a contract basis, as indicated in the official notification. It is not a permanent government position.
